guidelines: Keep modal content focused on a single task
Provide a clear close mechanism (X button, overlay click, Escape key)
Use a dimmed overlay to focus attention on the modal
Place primary action on the right, secondary on the left
colorGuidance: White modal surface on a dark semi-transparent overlay
Standard actions: brand accent primary button
spacingGuidance: Modal width: 400-560px for simple dialogs, up to 720px for complex ones
16-24px gap between header, body, and footer
commonMistakes: Modal too large, covering the entire screen unnecessarily
No way to close the modal via keyboard (Escape key)
Stacking multiple modals on top of each other
Long forms inside modals that should be full pages
qualityChecklist: Focus is trapped inside the modal when open
